Contenteditable edit-append (V0.19 actuator gate spike #2)

Task: append a new paragraph 'APPENDED LINE' to the END of the editable area below. Do NOT delete or modify the 3 existing paragraphs.

Para 1: lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.

Para 2: consectetur adipiscing elit.

Para 3: sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt.
